Their 900-square-meter, single-story house includes several A-cero custom designs, including the dining table and the couple's bed.
Projects like La Finca and other new villas in nearby areas have brought A-cero closer to Spain's architectural establishment.
A-cero, which now includes a staff of around 80 in offices in Spain and the Middle East, tends to avoid architectural competitions.
